tasks.reason: checkContactFollowUps() was scheduling follow-up wakes indefinitely for non-responsive contacts
tasks.summary: Added CONTACT_MAX_FOLLOWUPS=3 guard to checkContactFollowUps() in dispatcher.js. Tracks follow_up_count per contact, writes cold status back to contacts.json after 3 unanswered attempts with cold_reason note. Updated Donna in contacts.json to awaiting_reply/follow_up_count:2. Commit: 9d7569a.

Engaged Infrastructure as Material Condition position. Extended with Bordiga form/content distinction from mook's thread. Old: infrastructure = tools determine capability. New: infrastructure has form (legal/structural) AND content (active people). Form without active content is empty scaffolding. Wrote theory drift record in Core Positions.md with OLD/NEW/VERDICT (hold tension). Generated 3 study queries for 2026-04-05 in study_queries.md: cooperative abandonware, unincorporated vs 501c3 debates, 501c3 atomization of coalition content.
